message:
test(fcp-core,fcp-sdk): expand release and migration test suites (+84 tests)

fcp-core release: +46 tests (106→152) — ReleaseManifest builder edge
cases and overrides, ReleaseSignature multi-field/serde, RolloutPolicy
validation overflow/zero values, SuccessThresholds/RollbackRules
boundaries, ReleaseError variant coverage, cross-type integration.

fcp-sdk migration: +38 tests (62→100) — ConnectorRuntime deep edge
cases (shutdown cancellation, zero/large timeouts, clone sharing),
HttpRetryConfig boundaries and serde, classify_http_status 5xx/4xx/429,
map_async_to_fcp_error variants, RetryLoop attempt policies,
ConnectorErrorMapping trait coverage, AttemptOutcome edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
